stemHtml: An aircraft is on the glide slope and there is a microburst ahead that is to the right of the glidepath. What will this initially result in?

options.a: Increasing airspeed, right drift and a slight decrease in the rate of descent.
options.b: Increasing airspeed, left drift and a slight decrease in the rate of descent.
options.c: Decreasing airspeed, right drift and a slight increase in the rate of descent.
options.d: Decreasing airspeed, left drift and a slight increase in the rate of descent.
